headline: Assessing Truist Financial (TFC) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Truist Financial stock snapshot and recent performance Truist Financial (TFC) has been under pressure recently, with the stock down 2.6% over the past day, 8.4% over the past week, and about 7% over the past month. Over the past 3 months, the share price has declined roughly 10.6%, while the year to date move is a decline of about 6.4%. Even so, the 1 year total return stands at 18%, and the 3 year total return is about 8.8x, compared with a roughly flat 5 year total return. See our latest...

headline: JPMorgan vs. Truist: A Battle of Scale, Stability and Growth
